    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]

    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], CASE

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]

    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]

2026-05-05 04:28:26.884 +00:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@__orderId_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [p].[BatchID], [p].[OrderID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[Status], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[CurrentStep], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]
FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]

    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]

    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]

    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]

    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[BatchID], [p].[OrderID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[Status], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[CurrentStep], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]
FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE

        ELSE N'N/A'

    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[MaterialName]
    ELSE N'Unknown'
END AS [MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[MaterialCode]
    ELSE 'N/A'

END AS [UomName]

END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]

    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE

        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]

    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[BatchID], [p].[OrderID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[Status], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[CurrentStep], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[OrderID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [p0].[OrderID], [p0].[OrderCode], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName]
FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]

LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]

SELECT [r].[BomID], [r].[RecipeID], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Quantity], [r].[UomID], [r].[WastePercentage], [r].[Note], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialID], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomID], [u].[UomName]
FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [r].[UomID] = [u].[UomID]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__id_0
ORDER BY [r].[BomID]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

SELECT [p].[OrderID], [p].[OrderCode], [p].[RecipeID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[ActualQuantity], [p].[Status], [p].[StartDate], [p].[EndDate], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [a].[FullName], CASE
    WHEN [r].[RecipeID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [m].[MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0

    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[MaterialName]
    ELSE N'Unknown'
END AS [MaterialName], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m].[MaterialCode]
    ELSE 'N/A'

    ELSE N'kg'
END AS [UomName]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[BatchID], [p].[BatchNumber], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CurrentStep], [p].[EndTime], [p].[ExpiryDate], [p].[ManufactureDate], [p].[OrderID], [p].[PlannedQuantity], [p].[Status], [p0].[OrderID] AS [OrderID0], [p0].[ActualQuantity], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[EndDate], [p0].[Note], [p0].[OrderCode], [p0].[PlannedCartons], [p0].[PlannedQuantity] AS [PlannedQuantity0], [p0].[RecipeID], [p0].[StartDate], [p0].[Status] AS [Status0], [r].[RecipeID] AS [RecipeID0], [r].[ApprovedBy], [r].[ApprovedDate], [r].[BatchSize], [r].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [r].[EffectiveDate], [r].[MaterialID], [r].[Note] AS [Note0], [r].[Status] AS [Status1], [r].[VersionNumber], [m].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m].[BaseUomID], [m].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [m].[IsActive], [m].[MaterialCode], [m].[MaterialName], [m].[TechnicalSpecification], [m].[Type], [m].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UomID], [u].[Description], [u].[UomName]
    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
    LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p0].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
    WHERE [p].[BatchID] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r0].[BomID], [r0].[MaterialID], [r0].[Note], [r0].[Quantity], [r0].[RecipeID], [r0].[UomID], [r0].[WastePercentage], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[BaseUomID], [m0].[CreatedAt], [m0].[IsActive], [m0].[MaterialCode], [m0].[MaterialName], [m0].[TechnicalSpecification], [m0].[Type], [m0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [RecipeBOM] AS [r0]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]
ORDER BY [t].[BatchID], [t].[OrderID0], [t].[RecipeID0], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID], [t0].[BomID]

    FROM [ProductionBatches] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [ProductionOrders] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]

    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [r0].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[RecipeID0] = [t0].[RecipeID]

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [r].[RecipeID], [r].[BatchSize], CASE
    WHEN [m].[MaterialID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)

    WHEN [u].[UomID] IS NULL THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [u].[UomName], [a].[UserID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [p0].[BatchNumber], [p0].[Status], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialId], [t].[RequiredQuantity], [t].[MaterialName], [t].[UomName], [t].[MaterialID0], [t].[UomID]
FROM [ProductionOrders] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [AppUsers] AS [a] ON [p].[CreatedBy] = [a].[UserID]
LEFT JOIN [Recipes] AS [r] ON [p].[RecipeID] = [r].[RecipeID]
LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m] ON [r].[MaterialID] = [m].[MaterialID]
LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u] ON [m].[BaseUomID] = [u].[UomID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductionBatches] AS [p0] ON [p].[OrderID] = [p0].[OrderID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[OrderBomId], [p1].[MaterialId], [p1].[RequiredQuantity], CASE
        WHEN [m0].[MaterialID] IS NOT NULL THEN [m0].[MaterialName]
        ELSE N'Unknown'
    END AS [MaterialName], CASE
        WHEN [u0].[UomID] IS NOT NULL THEN [u0].[UomName]
        ELSE N'N/A'
    END AS [UomName], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [u0].[UomID], [p1].[OrderId]
    FROM [ProductionOrderBom] AS [p1]
    LEFT JOIN [Materials] AS [m0] ON [p1].[MaterialId] = [m0].[MaterialID]
    LEFT JOIN [UnitOfMeasure] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UomId] = [u0].[UomID]
) AS [t] ON [p].[OrderID] = [t].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [p].[OrderID], [a].[UserID], [r].[RecipeID], [m].[MaterialID], [u].[UomID], [p0].[BatchID], [t].[OrderBomId], [t].[MaterialID0]

LEFT JOIN [StepParameters] AS [s] ON [r].[RoutingID] = [s].[RoutingId]
WHERE [r].[RecipeID] = @__order_RecipeId_0 AND ([r].[OrderID] IS NULL OR [r].[OrderID] = 0)
ORDER BY [r].[StepNumber], [r].[RoutingID]
